events.title: Activities
events.minigameSummary:
Join in with 1 of 6 board games 
and make new friends through every game.
events.roundsNote: Please select a time slot. Some rounds may be unavailable due to conditions.
events.conflictMessage: You can't book this time slot because it conflicts with another activity you've already selected.
events.roundLockedMessage: You can't select this round because you've already registered for another round of this activity.
events.confirmMessage: Do you want to add {name}, Round {index}?
events.failMessage: Invalid student ID, or you are not registered in the system.

dixit.name: Dixit
dixit.description: A storytelling card game full of imagination — one player becomes the "storyteller" and gives a clue from a dreamlike illustration, while everyone else guesses which card matches.

sheriff-of-nottingham.name: Sheriff of Nottingham
sheriff-of-nottingham.description: Play as a merchant trying to smuggle goods into the city while dodging the Sheriff's inspection — bluff, negotiate, and outwit each other.

the-mind.name: The Mind
the-mind.description: A cooperative game where players must play numbered cards in ascending order without communicating at all — pure teamwork and intuition.

insider.name: Insider
insider.description: A social deduction game — one secret "insider" already knows the answer and must guide the group there without getting caught.

muffin-time.name: Muffin Time
muffin-time.description: A fast, silly party card game — whoever is left holding the "burnt muffin" card when time's up loses instantly.

exploding-kittens.name: Exploding Kittens
exploding-kittens.description: Draw cards and avoid the exploding kitten — use special cards to defuse it or trick your opponents into drawing it instead.

header.description: Record your best moments from RPKM via Reels or TikTok, and win prizes by using our hashtags.

igstory.description: Share your Chula Jigsaw or Chula QR Quest hunt moments using the 'Add Yours' sticker on Instagram Stories.
igstory.gift: First 50 to join win free prizes!
igstory.finish: Take part in Chula Jigsaw or Chula QR Quest
igstory.share: Share your IG Story through Add Yours
igstory.announce: Stay tuned for the winner listings!

reelstiktok.description: Create a video (under 1 minute) sharing your RPKM experience, while incorporating at least 1 SDG goal.

troubleshoot.title: Camera Troubleshooting
troubleshoot.intro: If the camera doesn't start or the screen stays black, follow the steps for your browser.
troubleshoot.chromeSteps:
1. Tap the lock or settings icon next to the address bar
2. Open Permissions
3. Allow Camera
4. Refresh this page
troubleshoot.safariSteps:
1. Tap the "AA" or settings button in the address bar
2. Open Website Settings
3. Set Camera to Allow
4. Reload this page

Or go to Settings > Safari > Camera and choose Allow.
troubleshoot.genericSteps:
• Close other apps or tabs using the camera, then retry
• Refresh this page
• If it still fails, try another browser or device

scannerError.permissionDenied: We need permission to use the camera. Please allow camera access, then try again.
scannerError.noCamera: We couldn't find a camera on this device. Try another device.
scannerError.inUse: The camera is being used by another app or tab. Close it and try again.
scannerError.overconstrained: We couldn't start the camera on this device. Please try another one.
scannerError.insecureContext: The camera only works on a secure (https) connection. Please open this page over https.
scannerError.unsupported: This browser doesn't support the camera. Try a different browser.
scannerError.aborted: Starting the camera was interrupted. Please try again.
scannerError.security: Your browser blocked camera access. Check your browser settings and try again.
scannerError.typeError: Something went wrong while starting the camera. Please try again.
scannerError.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
